overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l l l} E _ {1}: & S & \text {(success on first trial)} \\ E _ {2}: & F S & \text {(failure on first, success on second)} \\ E _ {3}: & F F S & \text {(first success on the third trial)} \\ E _ {4}: & F F F S & \text {(first success on the fourth trial)} \\ \vdots \\ E _ {k}: & \underbrace {F F F \ldots F} _ {k - 1} S & \text {(first success on the k^{th} trial)} \\ \vdots \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l l l} E _ {1}: & S & \text {(success on first trial)} \\ E _ {2}: & F S & \text {(failure on first, success on second)} \\ E _ {3}: & F F S & \text {(first success on the third trial)} \\ E _ {4}: & F F F S & \text {(first success on the fourth trial)} \\ \vdots \\ E _ {k}: & \underbrace {F F F \ldots F} _ {k - 1} S & \text {(first success on the } k^{\mathrm{th}} \text { trial)} \\ \vdots \end{array}

overrides.expect: \begin{array}{l} E (Y) = \int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} y f (y) d y \\ \qquad = \int_ {0} ^ {1} y \left[ \frac {y ^ {\alpha - 1} (1 - y) ^ {\beta - 1}}{B (\alpha , \beta)} \right] d y \\ \qquad = \frac {1}{B (\alpha , \beta)} \int_ {0} ^ {1} y ^ {\alpha} (1 - y) ^ {\beta - 1} d y \\ \qquad = \frac {B (\alpha + 1 , \beta)}{B (\alpha , \beta)} \qquad \text {(because \alpha > 0 implies that \alpha + 1 > 0)} \\ \qquad = \frac {\Gamma (\alpha + \beta)}{\Gamma (\alpha) \Gamma (\beta)} \times \frac {\Gamma (\alpha + 1) \Gamma (\beta)}{\Gamma (\alpha + \beta + 1)} \\ \qquad = \frac {\Gamma (\alpha + \beta)}{\Gamma (\alpha) \Gamma (\beta)} \times \frac {\alpha \Gamma (\alpha) \Gamma (\beta)}{(\alpha + \beta) \Gamma (\alpha + \beta)} = \frac {\alpha}{(\alpha + \beta)}. \end{array}
overrides.new: \begin{array}{l} E (Y) = \int_ {- \infty} ^ {\infty} y f (y) d y \\ \qquad = \int_ {0} ^ {1} y \left[ \frac {y ^ {\alpha - 1} (1 - y) ^ {\beta - 1}}{B (\alpha , \beta)} \right] d y \\ \qquad = \frac {1}{B (\alpha , \beta)} \int_ {0} ^ {1} y ^ {\alpha} (1 - y) ^ {\beta - 1} d y \\ \qquad = \frac {B (\alpha + 1 , \beta)}{B (\alpha , \beta)} \qquad \text {(because } \alpha > 0 \text { implies that } \alpha + 1 > 0\text {)} \\ \qquad = \frac {\Gamma (\alpha + \beta)}{\Gamma (\alpha) \Gamma (\beta)} \times \frac {\Gamma (\alpha + 1) \Gamma (\beta)}{\Gamma (\alpha + \beta + 1)} \\ \qquad = \frac {\Gamma (\alpha + \beta)}{\Gamma (\alpha) \Gamma (\beta)} \times \frac {\alpha \Gamma (\alpha) \Gamma (\beta)}{(\alpha + \beta) \Gamma (\alpha + \beta)} = \frac {\alpha}{(\alpha + \beta)}. \end{array}

overrides.expect: r = \frac {S _ {x y}}{\sqrt {S _ {x x} S _ {y y}}} = \frac {\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} x _ {i} y _ {i} - \frac {1}{n} \left(\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} x _ {i}\right) \left(\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} y _ {i}\right)}\sqrt {\left[ \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} x _ {i} ^ {2} - \frac {1}{n} \left(\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} x _ {i}\right) ^ {2} \right] \left[ \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} y _ {i} ^ {2} - \frac {1}{n} \left(\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} y _ {i}\right) ^ {2} \right]}.
overrides.new: r = \frac {S _ {x y}}{\sqrt {S _ {x x} S _ {y y}}} = \frac {\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} x _ {i} y _ {i} - \frac {1}{n} \left(\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} x _ {i}\right) \left(\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} y _ {i}\right)}{\sqrt {\left[ \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} x _ {i} ^ {2} - \frac {1}{n} \left(\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} x _ {i}\right) ^ {2} \right] \left[ \sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} y _ {i} ^ {2} - \frac {1}{n} \left(\sum_ {i = 1} ^ {n} y _ {i}\right) ^ {2} \right]}}.
